heading: How It Works
description: We calculate your salary potential in three simple steps.

1.heading: Enter Your Role
1.body: Tell us your job title, location, and current salary. Our smart autocomplete helps you match standard industry roles for better accuracy.

2.heading: We Check the Data
2.body: We query our live database of over 700,000+ recent salary benchmarks, sourced from government data (ONS) as well as live job listings (Adzuna).

3.heading: Get Your Salary Comparison
3.body: Find out instantly if you are underpaid, fairly paid, or leading the market. We'll even give you a custom script to negotiate a raise.

benchmark.description: Discover your true role value in three simple steps.

1.heading: Enter The Role
1.body: Tell us the job title, location, and target salary. Our smart autocomplete helps you match standard industry roles for better accuracy.

2.heading: We Check the Data
2.body: We query our live database of over 700,000+ recent salary benchmarks, sourced from government data (ONS) as well as live job listings (Adzuna).

3.heading: Get Your Salary Comparison
3.body: Find out instantly if you role offer is under valued, fair value or leading the market.
